channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Companies with incomplete business letters face sanctions August 1 – CAC
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Companies with incomplete business letters face CAC sanctions from August 1, 2026. Ensure compliance with CAMA 2020 to avoid penalties.
Read More: https://punchng.com/companies-with-incomplete-business-letters-face-sanctions-august-1-cac/

item.title: Borno subsidises fertiliser by 50%, distributes free farm inputs to 120,000 farmers
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Borno State Governor, Babagana Zulum, flags off the 2026 wet farming season, subsidising fertiliser by 50% and distributing free farm inputs to 120,000 far
Read More: https://punchng.com/borno-subsidises-fertiliser-by-50-distributes-free-farm-inputs-to-120000-farmers/

item.title: Police arrest 135 suspected cultists in Lagos, recover 26 firearms
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lagos State Police Command arrested 135 suspected cultists and recovered 26 firearms during raids to prevent 7/7 cult violence. Read more on Lagos cultism.
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-135-suspected-cultists-in-lagos-recover-26-firearms/

item.title: Reps move to expand SSDC funding
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The House of Representatives is considering a bill to expand SSDC funding, proposing additional revenue from VAT, Ecological Fund, and extractive companies
Read More: https://punchng.com/reps-move-to-expand-ssdc-funding/

item.title: Election not war, Osun ZLP candidate cautions against killings
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Osun ZLP candidate, Olufemi Adesuyi, warns politicians against shielding criminals and condemns election violence, urging peace ahead of the August 15 gube
Read More: https://punchng.com/election-not-war-osun-zlp-candidate-cautions-against-killings/

item.title: PFIPC scandal: I never met Gbajabiamila physically – ‘Fake’ DG
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The self-styled DG of the fictitious PFIPC, Adeniyi Adeyemi, denies ever meeting Femi Gbajabiamila physically, calling for an investigation into the PFIPC
Read More: https://punchng.com/pfipc-scandal-i-never-met-gbajabiamila-physically-fake-dg/

item.title: FULL LIST: Nominees for 2026 Emmy Awards
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
See the full list of nominees for the 78th Emmy Awards in 2026, with “The Pitt” leading with 25 nominations. Find out who’s nominated!
Read More: https://punchng.com/full-list-nominees-for-2026-emmy-awards/

item.title: VIDEO: ‘I didn’t cry, I stayed focused,” says Nigerian STEM olympiad gold medallist
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Egejurum Onyedikachi, a Nigerian STEM Olympiad gold medallist, reflects on his challenging yet victorious journey to becoming the world’s best in Mathemati
Read More: https://punchng.com/video-i-didnt-cry-i-stayed-focused-says-nigerian-stem-olympiad-gold-medallist/

item.title: Court awards ex-Power Minister Agunloye N10m against EFCC
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Former Power Minister Olu Agunloye wins N10m in damages against EFCC for defamatory publication. Court rules EFCC’s ‘fraud’ claim was false.
Read More: https://punchng.com/court-awards-ex-power-minister-agunloye-n10m-against-efcc/

item.title: Confusion over N100 notes ends as CBN issues clarification
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: In a statement issued on Wednesday by the Acting Director of Corporate Communications, Hakama Sidi-Ali, the apex bank said it had received reports that some individuals and businesses were refusing to accept the standard N100 note because they believed it was no longer valid.

item.title: Tinubu, Sanwo-Olu Urge CSOs To Put Nigeria First
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: President Bola Tinubu and Lagos State Governor Babajide Sanwo-Olu have urged civil society and community-based organisations to embrace patriotism, accountability and stronger collaboration with government to advance Nigeria’s sustainable development. Speaking on Wednesday at the National Summ

item.title: Shoot terrorists on sight, don’t wait for orders, defence minister tells troops
item.dc:creator: Ripples Nigeria
item.description: The Minister of Defence, General Christopher Musa (retd.), has directed military personnel and other security operatives to take immediate action against terrorists and armed bandits without waiting for authorisation from superior officers, warning that any operative who fails to engage criminals un

item.title: 2027: Kwara APC women seek deputy gov, speaker slots
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Kwara APC women appeal to party leadership to reserve deputy governor and speaker positions for female members in the 2027 general elections.
Read More: https://punchng.com/2027-kwara-apc-women-seek-deputy-gov-speaker-slots/

item.title: Red Cross seeks collaboration on humanitarian response in Kogi
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "The Red Cross cannot do it alone. The synergy we celebrate today between the Society and the leaders of our state is the engine that will drive our humanitarian goals to every corner of Kogi State—from Lokoja to Okene, from Idah to Kabba."

item.title: Don’t wait for orders to kill bandits, Defence Minister tells troops
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Minister of Defence, General Christopher Gwabin Musa (Rtd.), has directed security personnel deployed to combat insecurity to immediately engage and neutralise bandits and terrorists without waiting for further authorisation. Musa gave the directive on Wednesday in Sokoto while commissioning 62 oper

item.title: Woman Gives Birth To Baby Boy While Shopping For Baby Items At Ibadan Market
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: A pregnant woman unexpectedly gave birth to a baby boy after going into labour while shopping for baby items at the popular Gbagi Market in Ibadan, Oyo State. The incident occurred when the woman, who had visited the market to purchase essentials for her unborn child, reportedly started experiencing

item.title: Henderson has surgery in USA after breaking arm
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Jordan Henderson has had surgery after breaking his arm during the celebrations of England's win over Mexico on Sunday.

item.title: More than two-thirds of tech stocks are at least 20% off recent highs. What’s happening to the AI trade?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Major semiconductor names have been falling hard as investors take profits following a blockbuster second quarter.

item.title: ‎Peggy Ovire Finalizes Divorce Process From Frederick Leonard, Jubilates!
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: ‎‎Nollywood actress Peggy Ovire has sparked reactions on social media after celebrating the finalisation of her divorce from her ex-husband, actor Frederick Leonard Mmaduabuchi. ‎‎The actress shared a message expressing gratitude, writing, “Thank You Jesus. It is Done,” which many interpreted as her

item.title: Aviation Unions Threaten Strike Over Unpaid Ticket Levies
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The unions said that the tickets sales charge is not a profit, but resources meant to facilitate safe air transportation The post Aviation Unions Threaten Strike Over Unpaid Ticket Levies appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Can Fery emulate Raducanu with run to major title?
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Given Britain's Arthur Fery is now only two victories away from achieving what looked to be mission impossible before Wimbledon started, it is only fair to draw comparisons.

item.title: Wanted bandit kingpin captured in Delta forest
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Security operatives capture wanted bandit Abubakar Usman in Delta forest after rescue operation for kidnapped victim. The post Wanted bandit kingpin captured in Delta forest appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Five key takeaways from the NATO summit in Ankara
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Trump dominates summit with anti-Europe and Iran diatribes as NATO pledges to expand defence budgets and Ukraine support

item.title: In Bordeaux's brand new eco-district of Brazza, homes turn into ovens during the heatwave
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: France is experiencing its third heatwave in two months. In Bordeaux the thermometre hit 40 degrees Celsius this week, including in its new eco-neighbourhood. The apartment blocs are new, built to the latest standards - but inside it’s like an oven, and residents have had enough. FRANCE 24's Emerald

item.title: Police Arrest 135 Suspected Cultists During 7/7 Crackdown In Lagos
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Operatives of the Lagos State Police Command have arrested 135 suspected cultists during coordinated operations carried out across the state to prevent activities marking the annual 7/7 cult anniversary. The Commissioner of Police, Fatai Tijani, disclosed this on Wednesday while briefing journalists

item.title: BREAKING: S&P places Nigeria on watchlist for frontier market reclassification
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices (S&P DJI) has placed Nigeria on its 2027 watchlist for a potential reclassification as a “Frontier” market, citing regulatory reforms aimed at improving transparency, market integrity, and accessibility. The post BREAKING: S&P places Nigeria on watchlist for fron

item.title: ‘I’ve plenty of time on my hands’: Advisers bombard me with offers of free steak dinners. Is it wrong to go for the food?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “I get hungry for a meal at a good restaurant.”

item.title: Jeff Bezos’s space company may be seeking a valuation more than twice as big as Rocket Lab’s
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Blue Origin is reportedly targeting a $130 billion private-market valuation, which would be just a fraction of SpaceX’s nearly $2 trillion market capitalization.

item.title: With Micron’s stock well off its peak, investors want proof that the AI boom can last
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Investors in memory stocks are looking for signs that elevated pricing can be sustained for years without demand suffering.

item.title: Argentina fans accused of violence, racism by Egypt, Cape Verde supporters
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Fans tell Al Jazeera Argentina supporters hurled beer bottles and abuse at them when their team scored in knockout games.

item.title: Mass cleanup underway after severe flooding in China
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Residents and volunteers in China’s Guangxi province have begun clearing up their flooded homes.

item.title: Trump says the U.S. will give license to Ukraine to produce Patriot defense systems
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: President Donald Trump said Wednesday that the U.S. will give a licence to Ukraine to manufacture Patriot air defense systems to help counter Russian missile attacks, a huge coup for Ukraine which has badly needed the technology for the war now in its fifth year. FRANCE 24's Emerald Maxwell reports.

item.title: City Boys Visit Excites Akpabio, Predicts ‘Maximum Victory’ For Tinubu
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: A courtesy visit by the City Boy Movement to the President of the Senate, Godswill Akpabio on Wednesday rekindled hopes of victory for President Bola Tinubu in the 2027 presidential election. The Movement is one of the political interest groups backing the President’s re-election bid. A visibl

item.title: Abia opposition declares: Tear him for his bad verses; tear Otti for his bad grammar
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Godwin Adindu compares Abia opposition criticism of Governor Otti’s projects to Shakespeare’s Julius Caesar mob scene. The post Abia opposition declares: Tear him for his bad verses; tear Otti for his bad grammar appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Trump says will 'cut off all trade with Spain' over NATO contribution row
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: US President Donald Trump threatened Wednesday to halt all trade with Spain amid a bitter row over Madrid's defence spending and failure to help Washington with the Iran war. "Spain is a wasted cause. We don't want to do any trade business with Spain anymore," Trump said as he arrived at a NATO summ

item.title: Nigeria’s oil output grows by 40,000bpd as Esso launches $1bn Usan project
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Esso begins $1bn Usan Infill Project expected to increase Nigeria’s crude oil production by 40,000 barrels per day. The post Nigeria’s oil output grows by 40,000bpd as Esso launches $1bn Usan project appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: TCN Repairs Zaria–Funtua Transmission Line Without Power Outage
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Transmission Company of Nigeria (TCN) has completed live-line maintenance on the Zaria–Funtua 132kV transmission line without interrupting bulk power supply. The maintenance, carried out by TCN’s Kaduna Region Live-Line Crew from July 4 to July 7, 2026, involved replacing damaged glass dis

item.title: Three suspects arrested in Kogi over murder of teacher
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "Further investigation revealed that on 18th June 2026, Ojonojima Mary, younger sister to Ramatu Isiaka Eleojo, went to Brains Minds Nursery and Primary School, Ugbamaka, where she assaulted the deceased in her workplace."

item.title: Trump floats idea of Australia’s retirement system again. But what about Social Security?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The president said his administration was working on a plan based on the Austrialian system, days after the launch of “Trump accounts” for children.

item.title: Lawmakers ask Nigerian govt to halt rehabilitation of repentant terrorists
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The lawmakers said the policy undermines efforts to combat insecurity and emboldens criminal elements. The post Lawmakers ask Nigerian govt to halt rehabilitation of repentant terrorists appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Governing Council of Abia State University (ABSU), Uturu, has inaugurated a Search Team to commence the process of recruiting the institution’s ninth substantive Vice-Chancellor. The Pro-Chancellor and Chairman of the Governing Council, Rt. Hon. Dr. Agwu U. Agwu, inaugurated the committee during

item.description: According to a new study, people with higher levels of physical fitness may be better able to manage stress, anxiety and anger than those who are less fit The post Staying fit helps stay calm under stress — Experts appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.description: Kharg Island, pivotal to Iran's oil exports, becomes focal point as Trump renews threats amid rising Gulf tensions.

item.description: More than a million mourners packed streets in Najaf, Iraq for Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei’s funeral procession.

item.description: Bruno Guimaraes has asked to leave Newcastle, with Arsenal accelerating their interest in the midfielder, BBC Sport reports. The Brazil international, who arrived from Lyon in 2022, has been a player of interest for the Premier League champions this summer. The Gunners had looked into approaches for

item.title: Google Search Shatters All-Time Record Following Argentina Win Against Egypt
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Google Search has officially broken all prior usage records, registering the highest traffic spike in the company’s 28-year history. The unprecedented surge occurred immediately after Argentina’s late-game winning goal against Egypt in Tuesday’s World Cup Round of 16 match. Nick Fox, Goo

item.title: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: As part of Microsoft's big Xbox "reset," which includes layoffs affecting 3,200 staffers, jettisoning studios, and shifting investments to focus on "higher priority projects," Obsidian Entertainment is changing its plans. The studio, behind games like Grounded and The Outer Worlds, is starting work

item.title: Chelsea and Man United reach agreement for top midfielder
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Andrey Santos is reportedly on the verge of joining Manchester United after the Red Devils reached an agreement with Chelsea over the Brazilian midfielder's transfer. The two Premier League clubs are said to have finalized the framework of the deal, with only the final paperwork and personal terms r

item.title: 2027: Ogun West Indigenes Endorse Adebutu’s Governorship Bid
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: The PDP governorship candidate in Ogun, Oladipupo Adebutu on Wednesday received a hero’s welcome, when thousands of Yewa indigenes, Ogun West senatorial district, trooped out to receive and endorse his

item.title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.

item.title: Bill to curb street begging scales second reading at Lagos Assembly
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Lagos Assembly advances bill seeking to prohibit street begging, promote public safety, sanitation and rehabilitation of vulnerable persons. The post Bill to curb street begging scales second reading at Lagos Assembly appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: The Mystery of Phantom Council: Inside PFIPC Scandal that shook the Presidency
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The controversy took another dramatic turn when reports indicated that the PFIPC had appeared in discussions surrounding a reported ₦1.3 billion allocation in the 2026 federal budget. The revelation triggered widespread public debate.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz Is Iran's 'New Nuclear Weapon' Says Miller
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Aaron David Miller, senior fellow at Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, joined Balance of Power to discuss the recent escalation in the Middle East. He said Iran will go to "extreme lengths" to ensure it exercises some control over the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.description: The Kano State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) has rejected claims that some of its members in Kumbotso Local Government Area defected to the National Democratic Congress (NDC), insisting that the party remains united in the area. In a statement issued on Wednesday, the APC’s Publicit

item.title: NRS: Tinubu’s Reforms lift Reserves to $50bn, Tax Revenue to ₦28.3tn
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The report showed that GDP growth increased from 2.74 per cent in 2023 to 3.89 per cent by the first quarter of 2026, while headline inflation, which stood at 22.2 per cent in April 2023 and later peaked at 34.8 per cent in December 2024, declined to 15.9 per cent in 2026.

item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Medics report 12 injuries alongside eight deaths in Gaza as Israeli air strikes target civilians and displaced families.

item.title: Man United Agree £50m Deal With Chelsea For Andrey Santos.

item.description: Manchester United have agreed a £50m deal with Chelsea for their Brazilian midfielder Andrey Santos, BBC Sport reports. The deal has progressed quickly in the past few hours after United made their interest known over the weekend. United will pay an initial £48m for Santos, with an additional £2m in

item.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

The illness, described by manager Ståle Solbakken as a few is

At the beginning of the challenge, Mamdani favored Riyad Mahrez over Son Heung-min. He also chose the Algerian player ins

item.title: A ‘few’ Fed officials said there was a case for a rate hike in June, minutes from Warsh’s first meeting show
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: A “few” Federal Reserve officials said there was a case for raising interest rates in June, according to minutes released Wednesday from the central bank’s meeting last month.

item.title: El-Rufai demands ICPC retraction over alleged court order breach
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: It denied claims that El-Rufai violated any court order during his hospital visit, insisting no order restricted who could see him while receiving treatment.

item.title: Benue Assembly urges FG to arrest, prosecute Katsina-Ala attackers
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Benue State House of Assembly has called on the Federal Government to intensify efforts to secure vulnerable communities and ensure the arrest and prosecution of those responsible for the recent attack on Sai Community in Mbajir Council Ward of Katsina-Ala Local Government Area. The resolution w

item.title: Kano court restrains Senator Hanga’s son over alleged defamatory social media posts
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A Kano State High Court has issued an interim order restraining Muhammad Samir Rufa’i Sani Hanga from publishing or sharing alleged defamatory statements about Isa Ado Maidoya on Facebook and other social media platforms. Justice Jamilu Shehu Suleman granted the order after hearing an ex parte appli

item.title: Navy destroys illegal crude oil storage site, recovers 39,500 litres in Rivers
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Kingsley Omonobi The Nigerian Navy has intensified its crackdown on crude oil theft under Operation Delta Sentinel, uncovering an illegal crude oil storage network and recovering about 39,500 litres of suspected stolen crude oil in Bonny Local Government Area of Rivers State. The Director of Info

item.title: 2024 Bid Round: NUPRC hands oil prospecting licences to 12 firms
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Obas Esiedesa, Abuja The Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission (NUPRC) has formally presented Petroleum Prospecting Licences (PPLs) to successful bidders in the 2024 oil licensing round, issuing 19 prospecting licences to 12 companies as part of efforts to attract fresh investment int

item.title: Oil surges as Strait of Hormuz is back into ‘full conflict conditions’
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Even without further disruption, volatility is here to stay for energy markets

item.title: Benue seeks permanent site for General Hospital Otukpo
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Benue Government inspects sites for a permanent General Hospital Otukpo location to improve healthcare delivery in surrounding communities. The post Benue seeks permanent site for General Hospital Otukpo appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Brazil Energy Firm Origem Is Said to Seek $2.5 Billion Valuation
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Origem Energia SA, the Brazilian natural gas and oil company, is aiming for an enterprise value of $2 billion to $2.5 billion as it seeks strategic alternatives to raise capital, according to people familiar with the matter.

item.title: Transfer: Xhaka’s move to Chelsea collapses
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Sunderland midfielder, Granit Xhaka, has confirmed he will stay with Sunderland ahead of next season. Xhaka’s latest comments put an end to speculation linking him with a move to Chelsea. The 33-year-old was heavily linked with the Blues, amid talk of a reunion with Xabi Alonso, who he played

item.title: Transfer: Nigeria-eligible defender, Idris Fabiyi signs contract with Man Utd
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigeria-eligible defender, Idris Fabiyi, has signed his first-year scholarship contract with Manchester United. Fabiyi is among 15 promising youngsters who put pen to paper. ​Premier League regulations stipulate that all players under 17 years, must begin the season on a scholarship contract, until

item.title: EFCC arraigns ex-Port Harcourt refinery boss for money laundering
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The charges against Mr Dikko includes diversion of funds meant for the rehabilitation of the Port Harcourt refinery. The post EFCC arraigns ex-Port Harcourt refinery boss for money laundering appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Ponzi Scheme: Rivers Victims Seek FG Intervention To Recover Funds
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Angry investors in Rivers State of a Ponzi scheme called Tag have appealed to the Federal Government to assist them in recovering their trapped funds after the scheme crashed. Some of the investors, who stormed the office of the scheme’s operators in Igwuruta, an outskirt of Port Harcourt in O

item.title: Can NATO survive Trump's changes of heart?
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: These days, every official visit, every summit that involves the President of the United States seems like a mad scramble to keep the leader of the Atlantic Alliance on board. But what if it’s just too late? Last month, leaders left France thanking their lucky stars that Donald Trump hadn’t taken a
